---
title: "Examples"
subtitle: "Rendered plots with the source code available for each."
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
engine: markdown
---

Every example below lives in the [`examples/`](https://github.com/mcanouil/gribouille/tree/main/examples) directory of the repository.
Click the Source button under any plot to see the full Typst snippet, data and all.

## Basics

::: {.gallery}

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "minimal.svg"
//| alt: "Scatter plot of iris sepal width against sepal length with points coloured by species across setosa, versicolor, and virginica."
//| file: "/assets/examples/minimal.typ"
```

### Minimal scatter
Inline iris sample plotted with a single [`geom-point`](../reference/geoms/geom-point.qmd) layer and continuous x/y scales.

{{< modal toggle target=modal-minimal label="Source" >}}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "multilayer.svg"
//| alt: "Line and point chart of monthly sales from month 1 to 6 for three regions (north, south, and east), all trending upwards."
//| file: "/assets/examples/multilayer.typ"
```

### Multilayer trend
Lines and points share a discrete colour mapping.
[`geom-line`](../reference/geoms/geom-line.qmd) + [`geom-point`](../reference/geoms/geom-point.qmd).

{{< modal toggle target=modal-multilayer label="Source" >}}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "labs-title.svg"
//| alt: "Scatter and line chart of count against month showing a rising trend, framed by a title, subtitle, caption, and axis labels."
//| file: "/assets/examples/labs-title.typ"
```

### Titles and labels
Title, subtitle, caption, and axis labels set in a single [`labs`](../reference/labs/labs.qmd) call.

{{< modal toggle target=modal-labs-title label="Source" >}}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "factor-inline.svg"
//| alt: "Scatter plot of a noisy sinusoidal pattern with points coloured by a three-level cluster factor coerced from a numeric column."
//| file: "/assets/examples/factor-inline.typ"
```

### Inline factor coercion
[`as-factor`](../reference/core/as-factor.qmd) forces a numeric column to be treated as discrete for the colour aesthetic.

{{< modal toggle target=modal-factor-inline label="Source" >}}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "penguins.svg"
//| alt: "Scatter plot of penguin body mass against flipper length, with points coloured by species revealing three separated clusters."
//| file: "/assets/examples/penguins.typ"
```

### Penguins
CSV-loaded dataset: flipper length versus body mass, coloured by species.

{{< modal toggle target=modal-penguins label="Source" >}}
:::

:::

## Bars and counts

::: {.gallery}

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "bar-simple.svg"
//| alt: "Bar chart of counts per fruit for four categories (apple, banana, cherry, and date), with banana tallest and cherry shortest."
//| file: "/assets/examples/bar-simple.typ"
```

### Simple bars
Discrete x counted with [`geom-bar`](../reference/geoms/geom-bar.qmd).

{{< modal toggle target=modal-bar-simple label="Source" >}}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "bar-count.svg"
//| alt: "Bar chart counting observations per category from A to D, with D the tallest and B the shortest."
//| file: "/assets/examples/bar-count.typ"
```

### Category counts
[`geom-bar`](../reference/geoms/geom-bar.qmd) backed by [`stat-count`](../reference/stats/stat-count.qmd) to tally observations per category.

{{< modal toggle target=modal-bar-count label="Source" >}}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "bar-stacked.svg"
//| alt: "Stacked bar chart of revenue per quarter (Q1 to Q3), with each bar split into contributions from products A, B, and C."
//| file: "/assets/examples/bar-stacked.typ"
```

### Stacked bars
[`geom-col`](../reference/geoms/geom-col.qmd) with [`position-stack`](../reference/positions/position-stack.qmd) for cumulative totals per group.

{{< modal toggle target=modal-bar-stacked label="Source" >}}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "bar-dodged.svg"
//| alt: "Grouped bar chart of revenue per quarter (Q1 to Q3) with products A, B, and C shown as side-by-side bars within each quarter."
//| file: "/assets/examples/bar-dodged.typ"
```

### Dodged bars
Side-by-side bars per group via [`position-dodge`](../reference/positions/position-dodge.qmd) on [`geom-col`](../reference/geoms/geom-col.qmd).

{{< modal toggle target=modal-bar-dodged label="Source" >}}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "bar-filled.svg"
//| alt: "Proportional bar chart where each quarter's total is normalised to 1, showing the share of revenue from products A, B, and C."
//| file: "/assets/examples/bar-filled.typ"
```

### Filled bars
Each column normalised to 1 with [`position-fill`](../reference/positions/position-fill.qmd) to compare shares.

{{< modal toggle target=modal-bar-filled label="Source" >}}
:::

:::

## Statistics and smoothers

::: {.gallery}

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "histogram.svg"
//| alt: "Histogram of a continuous value across 12 bins from 0 to 10, with most observations concentrated between roughly 6 and 7."
//| file: "/assets/examples/histogram.typ"
```

### Histogram
Continuous x binned with [`stat-bin`](../reference/stats/stat-bin.qmd) via [`geom-histogram`](../reference/geoms/geom-histogram.qmd).

{{< modal toggle target=modal-histogram label="Source" >}}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "smooth.svg"
//| alt: "Scatter plot of y against x overlaid with a linear smoother and its 95% confidence ribbon, showing a strong positive trend."
//| file: "/assets/examples/smooth.typ"
```

### Smoother
Scatter plus a linear fit with a 95% confidence ribbon from [`geom-smooth`](../reference/geoms/geom-smooth.qmd).

{{< modal toggle target=modal-smooth label="Source" >}}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "ribbon-bounds.svg"
//| alt: "Line chart of an upward trend over 20 steps with a shaded blue ribbon showing explicit lower and upper bounds around the line."
//| file: "/assets/examples/ribbon-bounds.typ"
```

### Ribbon bounds
Explicit `ymin` / `ymax` aesthetics drive [`geom-ribbon`](../reference/geoms/geom-ribbon.qmd) around a fitted line.

{{< modal toggle target=modal-ribbon-bounds label="Source" >}}
:::

:::

## Annotations

::: {.gallery}

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "reference-lines.svg"
//| alt: "Scatter plot of a noisy upward trend over 20 steps crossed by a red diagonal, a green horizontal, and a blue vertical reference line."
//| file: "/assets/examples/reference-lines.typ"
```

### Reference lines
[`geom-abline`](../reference/geoms/geom-abline.qmd), [`geom-hline`](../reference/geoms/geom-hline.qmd), and [`geom-vline`](../reference/geoms/geom-vline.qmd) overlaid on a trend.

{{< modal toggle target=modal-reference-lines label="Source" >}}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "text-labels.svg"
//| alt: "Two scatter plots of four points labelled Alpha, Beta, Gamma, and Delta, one with plain text annotations and one with boxed labels."
//| file: "/assets/examples/text-labels.typ"
```

### Text and label annotations
Points annotated with [`geom-text`](../reference/geoms/geom-text.qmd) and boxed [`geom-label`](../reference/geoms/geom-label.qmd).

{{< modal toggle target=modal-text-labels label="Source" >}}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "shape-linetype.svg"
//| alt: "Line and point chart of three groups (A, B, and C) drawn with distinct point shapes, line dash styles, and colours per group."
//| file: "/assets/examples/shape-linetype.typ"
```

### Shape and linetype per group
A single grouping maps to [`scale-shape`](../reference/scales/scale-shape.qmd), [`scale-linetype`](../reference/scales/scale-linetype.qmd), and a discrete colour.

{{< modal toggle target=modal-shape-linetype label="Source" >}}
:::

:::

## Scales and colour

::: {.gallery}

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "colour-bar.svg"
//| alt: "Scatter plot of a cosine wave where point colour encodes a continuous temperature variable shown by a vertical colourbar legend."
//| file: "/assets/examples/colour-bar.typ"
```

### Continuous colour guide
A colourbar appears automatically when colour is trained on a continuous variable via [`scale-colour-continuous`](../reference/scales/scale-colour-continuous.qmd).

{{< modal toggle target=modal-colour-bar label="Source" >}}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "viridis-colour.svg"
//| alt: "Scatter plot of a sinusoidal pattern with points coloured along the Viridis continuous palette encoding values from low to high."
//| file: "/assets/examples/viridis-colour.typ"
```

### Viridis continuous
[`scale-colour-viridis-c`](../reference/scales/scale-colour-viridis-c.qmd) maps a continuous variable through the Viridis palette.

{{< modal toggle target=modal-viridis-colour label="Source" >}}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "manual-palette.svg"
//| alt: "Point and line chart of three groups (apple, berry, and cherry) drawn in a manual palette of red, orange, and teal."
//| file: "/assets/examples/manual-palette.typ"
```

### Manual palette
User-supplied colours passed to [`scale-colour-manual`](../reference/scales/scale-colour-manual.qmd).

{{< modal toggle target=modal-manual-palette label="Source" >}}
:::

:::

## Facets and coordinates

::: {.gallery}

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "facets.svg"
//| alt: "Scatter plot of car weight against miles per gallon, split into three facet-wrap panels by cylinder count (4, 6, and 8)."
//| file: "/assets/examples/facets.typ"
```

### Facet wrap
One panel per level of a discrete variable via [`facet-wrap`](../reference/facets/facet-wrap.qmd).

{{< modal toggle target=modal-facets label="Source" >}}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "facet-grid.svg"
//| alt: "Scatter plot arranged on a facet grid of two rows (female and male) and three columns (species A, B, and C)."
//| file: "/assets/examples/facet-grid.typ"
```

### Facet grid
Panels laid out on a row × column grid with [`facet-grid`](../reference/facets/facet-grid.qmd).

{{< modal toggle target=modal-facet-grid label="Source" >}}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "coord-clip.svg"
//| alt: "Line and point chart of a quadratic curve from 0 to 25, clipped via Cartesian limits to show only x between 5 and 15."
//| file: "/assets/examples/coord-clip.typ"
```

### Cartesian zoom
[`coord-cartesian`](../reference/coord/coord-cartesian.qmd) clips the view via `xlim` and `ylim` without dropping data.

{{< modal toggle target=modal-coord-clip label="Source" >}}
:::

:::

## Themes

::: {.gallery}

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "themed.svg"
//| alt: "Three scatter plots of two groups drawn side by side, each using a different built-in theme: minimal, classic, and void."
//| file: "/assets/examples/themed.typ"
```

### Minimal theme
Per-element overrides with [`theme`](../reference/themes/theme.qmd) on top of [`theme-minimal`](../reference/themes/theme-minimal.qmd).

{{< modal toggle target=modal-themed label="Source" >}}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
```{typst}
//| output-filename: "theme-override.svg"
//| alt: "Line and point chart of the curve y equals 0.1 times x squared over 12 steps, rendered with enlarged axis titles and a cream panel background."
//| file: "/assets/examples/theme-override.typ"
```

### Theme overrides
Custom text sizes, panel fill, and grid colour passed through [`theme`](../reference/themes/theme.qmd).

{{< modal toggle target=modal-theme-override label="Source" >}}
:::

:::

::: {#modal-minimal description="Source for minimal.typ"}
### `minimal.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/minimal.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-multilayer description="Source for multilayer.typ"}
### `multilayer.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/multilayer.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-labs-title description="Source for labs-title.typ"}
### `labs-title.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/labs-title.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-factor-inline description="Source for factor-inline.typ"}
### `factor-inline.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/factor-inline.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-penguins description="Source for penguins.typ"}
### `penguins.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/penguins.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-bar-simple description="Source for bar-simple.typ"}
### `bar-simple.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/bar-simple.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-bar-count description="Source for bar-count.typ"}
### `bar-count.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/bar-count.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-bar-stacked description="Source for bar-stacked.typ"}
### `bar-stacked.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/bar-stacked.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-bar-dodged description="Source for bar-dodged.typ"}
### `bar-dodged.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/bar-dodged.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-bar-filled description="Source for bar-filled.typ"}
### `bar-filled.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/bar-filled.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-histogram description="Source for histogram.typ"}
### `histogram.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/histogram.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-smooth description="Source for smooth.typ"}
### `smooth.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/smooth.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-ribbon-bounds description="Source for ribbon-bounds.typ"}
### `ribbon-bounds.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/ribbon-bounds.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-reference-lines description="Source for reference-lines.typ"}
### `reference-lines.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/reference-lines.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-text-labels description="Source for text-labels.typ"}
### `text-labels.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/text-labels.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-shape-linetype description="Source for shape-linetype.typ"}
### `shape-linetype.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/shape-linetype.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-colour-bar description="Source for colour-bar.typ"}
### `colour-bar.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/colour-bar.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-viridis-colour description="Source for viridis-colour.typ"}
### `viridis-colour.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/viridis-colour.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-manual-palette description="Source for manual-palette.typ"}
### `manual-palette.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/manual-palette.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-facets description="Source for facets.typ"}
### `facets.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/facets.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-facet-grid description="Source for facet-grid.typ"}
### `facet-grid.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/facet-grid.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-coord-clip description="Source for coord-clip.typ"}
### `coord-clip.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/coord-clip.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-themed description="Source for themed.typ"}
### `themed.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/themed.typ >}}
:::

::: {#modal-theme-override description="Source for theme-override.typ"}
### `theme-override.typ`

{{< typst /assets/examples/theme-override.typ >}}
:::
